<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by vue-docgen-cli — do not edit. Source: src/components/CnQuickFilterBar/CnQuickFilterBar.vue -->

### Props

| Name      | Type     | Required | Default | Description                                                                                                                              |
| --------- | -------- | -------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `tabs`    | `array`  | ✓        | —       | Tab definitions — same shape `pages[].config.quickFilters[]` uses. `filter` is consumed by the parent (CnIndexPage), not this component. |
| `v-model` | `number` |          | `null`  | Index of the currently active tab, or `null` for none active.                                                                            |

### Events

| Name                  | Payload | Description                                                                                                                                       |
| --------------------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `update:active-index` | —       | Fired when the user clicks a different tab. Drives `v-model:active-index` on the parent; payload is the zero-based index of the newly active tab. |
